subcodes.first_line: This is the Epistle of Ḥusayn unto him who beareth this name and who hath sojourned for months in the vicinity of his Lord's mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الحسین الی الذی سمی بهذا الاسم و استقر فی جوار رحمه ربه اشهرا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
